hypotheses.description: Pullback in Uptrend with 10-Day Hold: buy when close > MA60 (long-term uptrend) AND 5d return < 0 (short-term pullback) AND 20d return > 0 (medium-term trend intact). Hold 10 trading days instead of 5 to allow mean-reversion to fully manifest.
hypotheses.entry_rule: close > ma60 AND return_5d < 0 AND return_20d > 0
hypotheses.change_reason: P3-09 diagnostic: H005 showed positive avg_ROI (+0.132) and Sharpe (+0.60) but failed permutation test due to small OOS sample. Extending hold from 5d to 10d is a pre-specified theory-driven change to allow mean-reversion to manifest. Not derived from optimising on observed results.
hypotheses.data_snooping_note: Hold period extension is pre-specified in P3-09 diagnostics before running any v3 validation. Not a post-hoc parameter search.
hypotheses.required_validation: Must pass permutation p<0.05 AND BH-FDR correction AND positive ROI across all windows on >=3 symbols
hypotheses.notes: V3 candidate. Based on H005. Forward window extended to 10d. No other parameter changes.

hypotheses.description: Momentum + Moderate Volume Confirmation: buy when 20d return > 0 AND volume z-score > 0.5 (moderately above average volume). Relaxes the original 1.0-sigma threshold to increase signal frequency for ETFs with stable volume profiles.
hypotheses.change_reason: P3-09 diagnostic: H004 volume_zscore_20d > 1.0 fires on ~16% of days under normal distribution — too strict for ETFs with low volume variability. Threshold relaxed to > 0.5 (half-sigma) to increase signal frequency while retaining volume confirmation intent.
hypotheses.data_snooping_note: Threshold relaxation pre-specified in P3-09 based on structural analysis (16% trigger rate), not by optimising on observed ROI.
hypotheses.required_validation: Must pass permutation p<0.05 AND BH-FDR correction AND positive ROI across all windows on >=3 symbols
hypotheses.notes: V3 candidate. Based on H004. Volume threshold lowered from 1.0 to 0.5 sigma. No other parameter changes.

hypotheses.description: Near-Breakout after Volatility Squeeze: buy when 20d realized volatility is in the bottom 25th percentile AND close is within 2% of the 20d high (>= 0.98 × max(high[-20:])). Tests whether near-breakout after volatility contraction predicts a sustained directional move.
hypotheses.change_reason: P3-09 diagnostic: H006 strict breakout (close > max high) almost never co-occurs with low-vol periods, yielding only 48 signals. Relaxing to >= 0.98× 20d-high captures near-breakout conditions, increasing signal count while retaining the volatility-contraction-then-expansion thesis.
hypotheses.data_snooping_note: H006 showed very high Sharpe (6.5) on n=48 signals which is unreliable. Relaxation is motivated by structural signal-count analysis, not by chasing the high Sharpe metric. Must be treated with skepticism.
hypotheses.required_validation: Must pass permutation p<0.05 AND BH-FDR correction AND positive ROI across all windows on >=3 symbols. High Sharpe on small n is not sufficient.
hypotheses.notes: V3 candidate. Based on H006. Breakout condition relaxed to near-high (2% tolerance). Sharpe inflation risk noted.

hypotheses.description: RSI Reversion Symbol-Specific Probe: RSI(5) < 30 buy / > 70 sell signal, tested specifically on symbol 2317 where P3-09 diagnostics showed locally positive ROI. This is an EXPLORATORY OBSERVATION — it is NOT a promotion candidate.
hypotheses.change_reason: P3-09 diagnostic: H002 showed negative overall ROI but symbol 2317 had +0.379 avg ROI. This probe isolates that observation for monitoring only. Cannot be promoted because the positive result was discovered post-hoc from batch diagnostics.
hypotheses.data_snooping_note: This candidate was motivated by observing positive ROI on symbol 2317 in P3-09 batch results. This is a post-hoc discovery and carries high data snooping risk. promotion_allowed is permanently false for this candidate.
hypotheses.required_validation: Observation only. No promotion criteria. Results must be documented but cannot trigger strategy changes.
hypotheses.notes: EXPLORATORY OBSERVATION ONLY. promotion_allowed=false is permanent for this candidate. Based on post-hoc observation of 2317 positive ROI in P3-09.
